'''Giant armadillos''' were huge [[Anti-aircraft weaponry|anti-aircraft]] [[Droid tank/Legends|droid tanks]] that fired [[Energy torpedo/Legends|energy balls]] into the sky. They were used by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] during their invasion on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] and escorted by [[Unidentified heavy battle droid model|large combat droids]].<ref name="GBA" /> Armadillos were covered with overlapping metallic shell-like plates that allowed them to twist and turn flexibly towards their targets yet remain protected. They were strategically placed throughout the streets of [[Theed/Legends|Theed]], [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], after the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Rebellion in Theed]], prepared to shoot down escaping transport ships or retaliatory [[N-1 starfighter/Legends|N-1 starfighters]]. However, because of the little amount of aerial resistance during the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], they were never put to good use and their production was ended after the Naboo crisis.
